message:
feat(ftui-showcase-wasm): implement WASM showcase runner (bd-lff4p.12.3)

Add ftui-showcase-wasm crate with ShowcaseRunner wasm-bindgen exports
and platform-independent RunnerCore wrapping StepProgram<AppModel>.

New ftui-web input-parser feature provides parse_encoded_input_to_event()
for converting frankenterm-web JSON input schema to ftui_core::event::Event.

- 12 native RunnerCore tests + 31 input parser tests all passing
- WASM compilation verified (wasm32-unknown-unknown)
- API follows wasm-showcase-runner-contract.md spec

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+[package]
+name = "ftui-showcase-wasm"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+license = "MIT"
+description = "WASM showcase runner for FrankenTUI demo app."
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
+homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
+readme = "../../README.md"
+
+[lib]
+crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
+
+[dependencies]
+ftui-web = { path = "../ftui-web", version = "0.1.0", features = ["input-parser"] }
+ftui-demo-showcase = { path = "../ftui-demo-showcase", version = "0.1.1", default-features = false }
+
+[target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.dependencies]
+js-sys = "0.3.85"
+wasm-bindgen = "0.2.108"
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+pretty_assertions = "1.4.1"
+
+[package.metadata.wasm-pack.profile.release]
+wasm-opt = ["-Oz", "--all-features"]
